title: phyllolepidum cyclocarpum subsp. cyclocarpum
intro: Phyllolepidum cyclocarpum subsp. cyclocarpum is a plant species commonly known as 'Globe Plant' or 'Water Globe', which belongs to the family Phyllolepidaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and diaphoretic properties. The Globe Plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
